access.shared_token_note: Une private key par compte Klaviyo. Pas de token partagé entre brands.

operations.name: list_flows
operations.description: List all flows in account (status, trigger)
operations.notes: Trigger types : list trigger (welcome), event trigger (abandoned cart), date trigger (birthday).

operations.name: create_template
operations.notes: Template != email send. Templates assigned to flow steps.

operations.name: list_segments
operations.notes: Segments are dynamic (re-evaluated continuously). Lists are static (manual).

known_limitations: Template HTML must be Klaviyo-flavored (template tags, dynamic data).
Cannot trigger a flow programmatically ; only by event/list/date.
Webhook events post-purchase have ~5 min delay typically.
learned_rules: Always test new flows in DRAFT mode with one personal address before activating.
Use UTM params consistently across flows for attribution tracking.
Suppression list : check before any email send to avoid sending to unsubscribed.
